outputs.loading_convention: Vanilla <script> tag exposes window.UIRender. CommonJS-compatible for headless tests with jsdom (not required by contract; provided as belt-and-braces).

contract_compliance.ui-render--controller-and-shell.json: matches: render/onCellClick/onRestart/mount signatures and ViewModel shape

notes: Renderer holds no game state and does not import rules-engine or ai-opponent.
Cell click handler defensively checks disabled state to handle browsers where pointer-events:none is unreliable.
Filled cells always have button.disabled=true so keyboard navigation cannot fire stale clicks.
